comments.body: FORCE_CLAIM: plan-review gate bypassed by user approval — no plan-review attestation was verified. Reason: "Post-epic remediation (audit follow-on); implementing now.".

compiled_state.description:
## What
The snapshot PRIMITIVE (materialize/cache/janitor/gate-source/coherence) is tested against ad-hoc non-rebar tmp git repos, but the end-to-end LLM gate against a non-rebar repo uses only FakeRunner; the live dogfooding ran against rebar itself. No live (real-agent) attested gate run against a generic non-rebar repo.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] A live (or recorded) attested gate run (verify_completion or review_ticket) against a small non-rebar sample repo, asserting it reads the snapshot and produces a signed verdict.
- [ ] Confirms the process has no rebar-specific assumptions (paths, structure).
compiled_state.title: Live end-to-end gate test against a non-rebar sample repo
